title: Boogaloo Joe Jones

infobox.value: Ivan Joseph Jones   (1940-11-01) November 1, 1940 (age 85)  United States

* *[Introducing the Psychedelic Soul Jazz Guitar of Joe Jones](/wiki/Introducing_the_Psychedelic_Soul_Jazz_Guitar_of_Joe_Jones "Introducing the Psychedelic Soul Jazz Guitar of Joe Jones")* (1968) * *[My Fire!](/wiki/My_Fire! "My Fire!")* (1968) * *[Boogaloo Joe](/wiki/Boogaloo_Joe "Boogaloo Joe")* (1969) * *[Right On Brother](/wiki/Right_On_Brother "Right On Brother")* (1970) * *[No Way!](/wiki/No_Way! "No Way!")* (1971) * *[What It Is](/wiki/What_It_Is_(Boogaloo_Joe_Jones_album) "What It Is (Boogaloo Joe Jones album)")* (1971) * *[Snake Rhythm Rock](/wiki/Snake_Rhythm_Rock "Snake Rhythm Rock")* (1973) * *[Black Whip](/wiki/Black_Whip "Black Whip")* (1973)

(born November 1, 1940), known professionally as **Joe Jones** or **Boogaloo Joe Jones**, is an American [jazz](/wiki/Jazz "Jazz") [guitarist](/wiki/Guitarist "Guitarist").[[1]](#cite_note-Cook2003-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)
* *[The New Genius of the Blues](/w/index.php?title=The_New_Genius_of_the_Blues&action=edit&redlink=1 "The New Genius of the Blues (page does not exist)")* (Prestige PR 7501)

Cook, Richard (2003-05-25). [*Blue Note Records: the biography*](https://archive.org/details/bluenoterecordsb00cook_0). [Justin, Charles & Co.](/w/index.php?title=Justin,_Charles_%26_Co.&action=edit&redlink=1 "Justin, Charles & Co. (page does not exist)") pp. [213](https://archive.org/details/bluenoterecordsb00cook_0/page/213)–. [ISBN](/wiki/ISBN_(identifier) "ISBN (identifier)") [978-1-932112-10-8](/wiki/Special:BookSources/978-1-932112-10-8 "Special:BookSources/978-1-932112-10-8"). Retrieved 15 August 2011.

["The Punishment Fits the Clime"](https://news.google.com/newspapers?id=vwwhAAAAIBAJ&sjid=VXMFAAAAIBAJ&pg=3975,3726780&dq=boogaloo-joe+guitar&hl=en). *Schenectady Gazette*. August 27, 1982. p. 32. Retrieved 15 August 2011.

Musical artist

**Ivan Joseph Jones** (born November 1, 1940), known professionally as **Joe Jones** or **Boogaloo Joe Jones**, is an American [jazz](/wiki/Jazz "Jazz") [guitarist](/wiki/Guitarist "Guitarist").[[1]](#cite_note-Cook2003-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Discography

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Boogaloo_Joe_Jones&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Discography")]

His song, Brown Bag, currently has 1 544 936 streams on Spotify as of 11 April 2024.

### As leader

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Boogaloo_Joe_Jones&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: As leader")]

* *[Introducing the Psychedelic Soul Jazz Guitar of Joe Jones](/wiki/Introducing_the_Psychedelic_Soul_Jazz_Guitar_of_Joe_Jones "Introducing the Psychedelic Soul Jazz Guitar of Joe Jones")* [AKA *The Mindbender*] ([Prestige](/wiki/Prestige_Records "Prestige Records") PR 7557, 1968; reissued on BGP/[Ace](/wiki/Ace_Records_(United_Kingdom) "Ace Records (United Kingdom)") in 1993)
* *[My Fire!](/wiki/My_Fire! "My Fire!") More of the Psychedelic Soul Jazz Guitar of Joe Jones* (Prestige PR 7613, 1968; reissued on BGP/Ace in 1993)
* *[Boogaloo Joe](/wiki/Boogaloo_Joe "Boogaloo Joe")* (Prestige PR 7697, 1969) -with [Rusty Bryant](/wiki/Rusty_Bryant "Rusty Bryant"), [Sonny Phillips](/wiki/Sonny_Phillips "Sonny Phillips")
* *[Right On Brother](/wiki/Right_On_Brother "Right On Brother")* (Prestige PR 7766, 1970) -with Rusty Bryant, [Charles Earland](/wiki/Charles_Earland "Charles Earland")
* *[No Way!](/wiki/No_Way! "No Way!")* (Prestige PR 10004, 1971) -with [Grover Washington Jr.](/wiki/Grover_Washington_Jr. "Grover Washington Jr."), Sonny Phillips, [Butch Cornell](/wiki/Butch_Cornell "Butch Cornell")
* *[What It Is](/wiki/What_It_Is_(Boogaloo_Joe_Jones_album) "What It Is (Boogaloo Joe Jones album)")* (Prestige PR 10035, 1971) -with Grover Washington Jr., Butch Cornell
* *[Snake Rhythm Rock](/wiki/Snake_Rhythm_Rock "Snake Rhythm Rock")* (Prestige PR 10056, 1973; reissued on BGP/Ace in 1992) -with Rusty Bryant, Butch Cornell
* *[Black Whip](/wiki/Black_Whip "Black Whip")* (Prestige PR 10072, 1973; reissued on BGP/Ace in 1992)
* *Sweetback* (Joka LPN 6007, 1976; reissued on Luv N' Haight/[Ubiquity](/wiki/Ubiquity_Records "Ubiquity Records") in 1995)
* *Legends Of Acid Jazz: Boogaloo Joe Jones* (Prestige, 1996) (compilation of *Boogaloo Joe* + *Right On Brother*)
* *Legends Of Acid Jazz: Boogaloo Joe Jones, Vol. 2* (Prestige, 1998) (compilation of *No Way!* + *What It Is*)

### As sideman

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Boogaloo_Joe_Jones&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: As sideman")]

**With [Rusty Bryant](/wiki/Rusty_Bryant "Rusty Bryant")**

* *[Night Train Now!](/wiki/Night_Train_Now! "Night Train Now!")* (Prestige PR 7735)

**With [Billy Hawks](/wiki/Billy_Hawks "Billy Hawks")**

* *[The New Genius of the Blues](/w/index.php?title=The_New_Genius_of_the_Blues&action=edit&redlink=1 "The New Genius of the Blues (page does not exist)")* (Prestige PR 7501)

**With [Richard "Groove" Holmes](/wiki/Richard_%22Groove%22_Holmes "Richard \"Groove\" Holmes")**

* *[Spicy!](/wiki/Spicy! "Spicy!")* (Prestige PR 7493)

**With [Willis Jackson](/wiki/Willis_Jackson_(saxophonist) "Willis Jackson (saxophonist)")**

* *[Gatorade](/wiki/Gatorade_(album) "Gatorade (album)")* (Prestige MPP 2516, 1971 [rel. 1982])
* *[The Gator Horn](/wiki/The_Gator_Horn "The Gator Horn")* (Muse MR 5146, 1977)
* *Lockin' Horns* (Muse MR 5200, 1978 [rel. 1981])

**With [Harold Mabern](/wiki/Harold_Mabern "Harold Mabern")**

* *[Greasy Kid Stuff!](/wiki/Greasy_Kid_Stuff! "Greasy Kid Stuff!")* (Prestige PR 7764)

**With [Houston Person](/wiki/Houston_Person "Houston Person")**

* *[Soul Dance!](/wiki/Soul_Dance! "Soul Dance!")* (Prestige PR 7621)

**With [Sonny Phillips](/wiki/Sonny_Phillips "Sonny Phillips")**

* *[Sure 'Nuff](/wiki/Sure_%27Nuff "Sure 'Nuff")* (Prestige PR 7737)
